add_exists: Card #{task_id} is already tracked in this topic
add_not_found: Task #{task_id} not found or no access
add_usage: Send the card number or a link to it from Bitrix
remove_not_tracked: Card #{task_id} is not tracked in this topic
list_empty: Nothing is tracked in this topic yet. Add a card: /add <id>
time_need_tz: Please set a timezone: /time {time} Asia/Bishkek — otherwise UTC is used
restricted_denied: Commands in this chat are admin-only
menu_empty_cards: Nothing is tracked in this topic yet.
menu_add_prompt: ➕ Reply to this message with a Bitrix card number or a link to it — e.g. 42103
menu_time_prompt: 🕘 Reply to this message with a time and city/timezone — e.g. 09:00 Belgrade
menu_rm_empty: Nothing to remove — no cards are tracked yet.
report_empty: No changes since the last digest ({date})
report_empty_never: No changes since this chat was connected
report_unknown_card: This card is not tracked in this topic
report_errors: ⚠️ Some of the report could not be collected — see logs for details
start_help:
🍕 I deliver daily construction digests from Bitrix24.

Setup (in the construction topic):
/add <card id> — track a card (Bitrix task ID)
/time 09:00 Europe/Belgrade — digest time and timezone
/lang en — digest language

Everyday:
/list — what's tracked in this topic
/remove <id> — stop tracking

Then it's automatic: once a day I post a summary of the discussion, decisions/blockers, checklist status and files. No changes — no message. Only activity after /add counts.

In groups, use the bot menu or address me explicitly: /add@dodo_constr_bot 42103 — I ignore bare commands in groups (other bots may live there).
